items.titolo: Via i vigili urbani, in Cina arrivano i robot umanoidi a dirigere il traffico

items.titolo: Nvidia's exposure to Asian supply chains for components hits 90% of its production costs — marked increase from 65% could intensify as physical AI adds even more exposure
